Advanced
Notifications

Notifications are emails sent when a form is submitted. By default, these emails include entry details. For setup and customization options, including a video overview, please see our tutorial.

After saving these settings, be sure to test a form submission. This lets you see how emails will look, and to ensure that they are delivered successfully.

Sorry, no results found

The current 'From Email' address does not match your website domain name (video-test-site.local). This can cause your notification emails to be blocked or marked as spam.

We strongly recommend that you install the free WP Mail SMTP plugin! The Setup Wizard makes it easy to fix your emails.

Alternately, try using a From Address that matches your website domain (admin@video-test-site.local).

Please check out our doc on fixing email delivery issues for more details.

Also Available

Custom Captcha

Ask custom questions or require your visitor to answer a random math puzzle.

Add to Form

reCAPTCHA

Add Google's free anti-spam service and choose between visible or invisible CAPTCHAs.

Get Started →

hCaptcha

Turn on free, privacy-oriented spam prevention that displays a visual CAPTCHA.

Get Started →

Cloudflare Turnstile

Enable free, CAPTCHA-like spam protection that protects data privacy.

Get Started →

Akismet

Integrate the powerful spam-fighting service trusted by millions of sites.

Get Started →
Form Themes

Customize the look and feel of your form with premade themes or simple style settings that allow you to use your own colors to match your brand. Themes and style settings are also available in the Block Editor and Elementor, where you can see a realtime preview. Learn more about styling your forms.

Preview only

The fields shown below are for demo purposes and do not reflect the fields in your actual form.

Want to customize your form styles without editing CSS?

Go to Settings

Form styles are disabled because Lead Form Mode is turned on.

To change the styling for this form, edit the options in the Lead Forms settings.

Form styles are disabled because Conversational Forms addon is turned on.

To change the styling for this form, edit the options in the Conversational Forms settings.

Update Available

Your version of Form Pages is out of date. For the best experience and access to all features, please update to the latest version.

Update Now

Select Your Marketing Integration

Select your email marketing service provider or CRM from the options on the left. If you don't see your email marketing service listed, then let us know and we'll do our best to get it added as fast as possible.

Constant Contact

Get the most out of WPForms — use it with an active Constant Contact account.

Try Constant Contact for Free

Learn more about the power of email marketing.

Uncanny Automator

Put Your WordPress Site on Autopilot

Build powerful automations that control what happens on form submission. Connect your forms to Google Sheets, Zoom, social media, membership plugins, elearning platforms, and more with Uncanny Automator.

Learn More

n8n

Instantly send form entries to thousands of other apps via n8n. Automatically create tasks, send emails, update spreadsheets, manage contacts, and much more. Learn more about the n8n integration.

New N8N Integration

It seems you don't have any payment addons activated. Click one of the available addons and start accepting payments today!

Stripe

Heads up! Stripe payments can't be enabled yet.

First, please connect to your Stripe account on the WPForms Settings page.

Learn more about our Stripe integration.

Square

Heads up! Square payments can't be enabled yet.

First, please connect to your Square account on the WPForms Settings page.

Learn more about our Square integration.
